evidence_sources.name: Windows Event Logs
evidence_sources.description: Review process creation, logon events, service changes, and file related activity where available.

evidence_sources.name: Sysmon Logs
evidence_sources.description: Review process creation, network connections, file creation, and registry activity.

evidence_sources.name: Endpoint Detection and Response
evidence_sources.description: Review endpoint alerts, process trees, command lines, detections, and host timeline.

evidence_sources.name: Identity Logs
evidence_sources.description: Review failed logons, successful logons, source locations, and privilege use.

evidence_sources.name: Entra ID Sign In Logs
evidence_sources.description: Review cloud sign in patterns, conditional access outcomes, and unusual locations.

evidence_sources.name: DNS Logs
evidence_sources.description: Review suspicious lookups, unusual domains, and possible command and control indicators.

evidence_sources.name: Firewall Logs
evidence_sources.description: Review unusual outbound traffic, denied connections, and connections to suspicious destinations.

evidence_sources.name: File Server Logs
evidence_sources.description: Review rapid file modifications, deletions, renames, and access patterns.
